subject: Fix maven staging and release jobs

In that case, can you please recommend a fix for this Jessica (logs below), It works fine on Ubuntu OS and not CentOS.

Patch Set 2:

As per our discussion in https://jira.linuxfoundation.org/servicedesk/customer/portal/2/IT-19460 ,
just changing the maven staging jobs to Ubuntu but leaving the release jobs as is with centos

Patch Set 2: Verified+1

Build Successful 

https://jenkins.onap.org/job/ci-management-jjb-verify/4583/ : SUCCESS

Logs: https://logs.onap.org/production/vex-yul-ecomp-jenkins-1/ci-management-jjb-verify/4583

Patch Set 2:

I think that you must use centos for the stage job as the signing tool only works on that OS and not ubuntu. But I'll let Jessica confirm when she comes in.

Patch Set 2:

> Patch Set 2:
> 
> I think that you must use centos for the stage job as the signing tool only works on that OS and not ubuntu. But I'll let Jessica confirm when she comes in.

Yes Pam. The signing is done by Release job and not Maven Stage Job I'm assuming. So I just changed the OS for Maven Stage and not Release Job

Patch Set 2:

> Patch Set 2:
> 
> > Patch Set 2:
> > 
> > I think that you must use centos for the stage job as the signing tool only works on that OS and not ubuntu. But I'll let Jessica confirm when she comes in.
> 
> Yes Pam. The signing is done by Release job and not Maven Stage Job I'm assuming. So I just changed the OS for Maven Stage and not Release Job

Or, Is my assumption not correct?

Patch Set 2:

> Patch Set 2:
> 
> > Patch Set 2:
> > 
> > > Patch Set 2:
> > > 
> > > I think that you must use centos for the stage job as the signing tool only works on that OS and not ubuntu. But I'll let Jessica confirm when she comes in.
> > 
> > Yes Pam. The signing is done by Release job and not Maven Stage Job I'm assuming. So I just changed the OS for Maven Stage and not Release Job
> 
> Or, Is my assumption not correct?

No see Jessica's comment from yesterday. The stage jobs do all the prep work and sign the artifacts and create the auto-release repo. The release jobs only read that autorelease and push to nexus.

If you must have ubuntu then you need to disable SIGUL as Jessica mentioned. But now you have unsigned artifacts, which may not be acceptable by ONAP.

Patch Set 2: Code-Review-1

(1 comment)

Thanks Pam!
